# Third-party notices

This port is based on the behaviour and public source code of:

- `kdroidFilter/SeforimLibrary`
- `kdroidFilter/Zayit`

Preserve the original copyright notices and comply with the licenses of the upstream projects and distributed data files. Before publishing a release containing or automatically downloading `lexical.db`, confirm the database's distribution terms separately.

The runtime data files are not included in this package.
